description: 议论文/时政写作结构标准 - 适用于 John Locke 等思辨写作竞赛

required_sections.name: Introduction / Hook
required_sections.description: 通过引人入胜的开篇吸引读者，明确论点

required_sections.name: Definition & Framework
required_sections.description: 界定核心概念，建立论证框架

required_sections.name: Argument Body 1
required_sections.description: 主论点一，含论据与分析

required_sections.name: Argument Body 2
required_sections.description: 主论点二，含论据与分析

required_sections.name: Counterargument & Rebuttal
required_sections.description: 回应反方观点，增强论证说服力

required_sections.name: Synthesis / Resolution
required_sections.description: 综合论证，推导深层含义

required_sections.name: Conclusion
required_sections.description: 回应论点、总结核心主张
